name: create_ticket
description: Create a new support ticket in tawk.to. Useful for logging issues that need follow-up outside of live chat.

parameters.name: property_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier for your tawk.to property.

parameters.name: message
parameters.example: Customer reports being unable to log in after password reset.

parameters.name: requester_email
parameters.description: The email address of the person reporting the issue.

parameters.name: requester_name
parameters.description: The name of the person reporting the issue.

body.subject: Account access issue
body.message: Customer reports being unable to log in after password reset.
